text:
Hi,

I was working on CVE-2015-1414.

Here is the link : https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2015-1414

Is it possible to reproduction? if yes , Could please help me on reproduction steps. 

Few doubts:
1. what should be the packet size?
2. Is we need to insert any data to craft the IGMP packet ?
